title: `information_schema.tables` return wrong result
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
create database test1;
create database test2;
create table test1.t (a int);
create table test2.t (a int);

select table_schema, table_name, tidb_table_id from information_schema.tables where tidb_table_id = 108;
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

There should be one row.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

Two rows with same table ID but different schema names.

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

19856622942a
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test3.t (a INTEGER, b VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c DATE DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test4.t (a INTEGER, b FLOAT, c TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
SELECT 'test3' AS table_schema, 't' AS table_name, 108 AS virtuoso_table_id WHERE 1=1;
key_bug_features: Duplicate rows for same table ID in different schemas
